# Customer Pain Points

Educators spend 40% of their time on administrative tasks rather than teaching.

The primary job-to-be-done: reduce time between lesson planning and student feedback.

However, this contradicts the assumption in [[market-analysis]] that customers will pay premium pricing. Our interviews show price sensitivity is the #1 barrier, unlike the pricing-model assumption of enterprise willingness to pay.

See also [[solution-design]] for proposed approach.
